STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-MAYOIUTA.description:
[gold]作曲[/gold]
攻击卡*2
我们在这里呼唤着
对一名敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-MAYOIUTA_TOKEN.descript: 对一名敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害2次。

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-HOPE_ON_THE_VOICE.descr:

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-WOODLOUSE.title: Woodlouse
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-WOODLOUSE.description: Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] Block. Gain [blue]{AtFieldPower}[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold]. Add a random [gold]Collectible[/gold] to your hand.

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-UNWANTED_SIXTH.title: The Unwanted Sixth
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-UNWANTED_SIXTH.descript: This turn, each time you gain Block, gain [blue]{UnwantedSixthPower}[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold] and add a Crumpled Paper to your hand.

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-WANT_TO_BEING_HUMAN.des: Remove all Block. For each point of Block removed, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until end of turn.

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-THIS_NO_NEED.title: This, No Need
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-THIS_NO_NEED.descriptio: If you have a Status in hand, Exhaust one. Deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage. Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] Block. Add a Cold Red Tea to your draw pile.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-THIS_NO_NEED.upgrade_de: If you have a Status in hand, Exhaust one. Deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage. Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] Block. Add a Cold Red Tea to your draw pile.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-STAY_UP_LATE.title: Pulling an All-Nighter
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-STAY_UP_LATE.descriptio: Draw cards equal to your [gold]ATField[/gold] stacks. Add a Midnight Coffee to your hand.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-STAY_UP_LATE.upgrade_de: Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold]. Draw cards equal to your [gold]ATField[/gold] stacks. Add a Midnight Coffee to your hand.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-ONCE_HOME.title: Once a Home
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-ONCE_HOME.description: Double your [gold]ATField[/gold] stacks. Add a Leftover Buffet to your discard pile.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-ONCE_HOME.upgrade_descr: Gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold]. Double your [gold]ATField[/gold] stacks. Add a Leftover Buffet to your discard pile.

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-POETRY_OR_LYRICS.descri: Exhaust ALL Collectibles from your hand, draw pile, and discard pile. For each Exhausted, gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and [blue]{AtFieldPower}[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold].
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-POETRY_OR_LYRICS.upgrad: Exhaust ALL Collectibles from your hand, draw pile, and discard pile. For each Exhausted, gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and [blue]{AtFieldPower}[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold].

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-TAKAMASU_CALCULUS.descr: Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] Block. Deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage. Gain [blue]{AtFieldPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold]. Each time you play this card, its values permanently increase by [blue]{Increase}[/blue] for this run.

STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-CRYCHIC_IS_OVER.upgrade: Discard all cards in your hand. For each card discarded, gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] Block. Gain [blue]{AtFieldPower}[/blue] [gold]ATField[/gold].
